title: Using the Portal
modulePurpose:
How to Find Answers Fast and Keep Sales Moving

Section Purpose
This section teaches agents how to confidently use the portal to find product information, generate quotes, send enrollments, and get answers quickly.
The portal is designed to be simple.
You do not need to memorize every detail.
You just need to know where to go.
And remember — you are never alone inside the system.
Columbus is built directly into the website and app to help you.
Agents should leave this section understanding:
where to find plan guides
where to generate quotes
where to send enrollment links
where to look when a customer asks a question
how to get comfortable using the system
how to use Columbus as a support resource
The goal of this module is simple:
Know where to click, and know who to ask.
Because confident agents close more business.

moduleSteps.title: Step 1 – Review Overview
moduleSteps.subtitle: Review Overview
moduleSteps.copy:
The Portal Is Your Command Center
The portal is where you access everything related to MightyWELL products.
It is designed to be:
simple
organized
easy to navigate
user-friendly
You are encouraged to click around and explore.
You will not break anything.
You will only get faster.

The Three Most Important Resources in the Portal
You do not need to master everything.
You only need to understand three things.

1) The Product Page
This Is Where You Learn the Plans
The Product Page is where you access all MightyWELL bundle information.
Every product has a guide.
And every guide contains everything you need to understand the product.
Inside each guide, you will find:
coverage details
visit information
prescription benefits
preventive services
provider search instructions
health share coordination details
pre-existing condition information
If you ever have a question about a plan:
Open the guide.
That is the rule.

Sales One-Liners
"Everything about the plan is inside the guide."
"If you can open the guide, you can answer the question."
"When in doubt, go to the Product Page."

2) The Marketing Page
This Is Where You Do Business
The Marketing Page is where you generate quotes and send enrollments.
This is the page you will use every day.
This is where you:
generate quotes
build proposals
send enrollment links
start applications

Sales One-Liners
"Quotes happen on the Marketing Page."
"Enrollment links come from the Marketing Page."
"If you're selling, you're on the Marketing Page."

3) Columbus — Your Built-In Assistant
Help Is Always Available
Columbus is built directly into the website and the app.
He is there to help you.
You can ask Columbus questions about:
coverage
benefits
plan details
how things work
where to find information
If you are unsure about something:
Ask Columbus.
He is available anytime.

What If Columbus Doesn't Know?
Sometimes questions require human support.
That is normal.
If Columbus cannot answer the question, you will simply be directed to the right team for help.
So you always have support.

Sales One-Liners
"If I don't know the answer, Columbus probably does."
"You can ask Columbus questions anytime inside the portal."
"Help is always one click away."

The Portal Is Built to Be Easy
You do not need technical skills.
You do not need special training.
You just need familiarity.
That comes from practice.
So click around.
Explore the system.
Open guides.
Run quotes.
Ask Columbus questions.
The more you use it, the faster you will become.

The Real Sales Message
Customers trust agents who sound prepared.
Prepared agents know where to find answers.
And agents who move quickly close more business.

moduleSteps.title: Step 2 – Instructions
moduleSteps.subtitle: Review Materials
moduleSteps.copy:
Log into the portal.
Spend a few minutes exploring.
You are not being tested on memory.
You are being tested on familiarity.
Go to the following areas:
The Product Page
The Marketing Page
The Columbus assistant
Open at least one product guide.
Scroll through it.
Ask Columbus at least one question.
Get comfortable.
That is the goal.

moduleSteps.title: Step 3 – Quiz Questions
moduleSteps.subtitle: Take Quiz
moduleSteps.copy:
Module 5 – Using the Portal
1. Did you go to the Product Page and open a bundle guide?
Correct Answer:
 Yes

2. Did you scroll through the guide and review the coverage details section?
Correct Answer:
 Yes

3. Did you locate the section explaining prescription or pharmacy benefits?
Correct Answer:
 Yes

4. Did you find the section explaining preventive services or routine care?
Correct Answer:
 Yes

5. Did you locate the section referencing the health share or major health event support?
Correct Answer:
 Yes

6. Did you go to the Marketing Page and locate the quoting tools?
Correct Answer:
 Yes

7. Did you ask Columbus a question inside the portal or app?
Correct Answer:
 Yes

8. True or False
The portal and Columbus are both available resources to help you find answers quickly.
Correct Answer:
 True

questions.questionText: Did you go to the Product Page and open a bundle guide?
Did you scroll through the guide and review the coverage details section?
Did you locate the section explaining prescription or pharmacy benefits?
Did you find the section explaining preventive services or routine care?
Did you locate the section referencing the health share or major health event support?
Did you go to the Marketing Page and locate the quoting tools?
Did you ask Columbus a question inside the portal or app?

True or False
The portal and Columbus are both available resources to help you find answers quickly.
